ops.title: AS-BUILT: format-core reconciliation + passes G/I + on-path fast-lane (the two-notes arc)
ops.body:
The 2026-07-13/14 arc that closed out the deferred-passes notes and the encoding-logic reconciliation, across cc-squash and cc-context.

DEPENDENCY DIRECTION (decided): the shape-classifying format selector lives ONCE as Rust format-core in cc-context (domain owner keeps the tuning loop); ccx consumes it as a wazero-run WASM blob (go:embed, compiler engine mandatory — interpreter 18x over the 5ms gate); cc-squash consumes the crate via a cargo git dep TAG-PINNED to cc-context releases (v0.16.0). Golden corpus (157 vectors) gates native + through-WASM in CI.

cc-squash main: recode chain finalized F→D→E→I→A→B→C→J→G (G last; every diff base renders verbatim); pass H dropped (API schema-validates tools[]); passes A/B swapped onto format-core (f3326831) fixing f64 lexeme corruption + needs_ref clobbering; NDJSON folding accepted + pinned. Fast-lane landed (bcd22961): D→E→A on-path over the provably-uncached tail, commitment set + explicit window (closed at birth, monotonic floor), staged-wins-when-spliced precedence, un-commit from base∩commitment, kill-switch/shadow close the window; four codex-refuter rounds, all prompt-correctness invariants PASS. Firing shape note: the lane engages only when a tool pair arrives with a trailing message in the same request (interactive sessions' injected reminders) — sequential -p cadence structurally never qualifies (pinned pair / advanced floor / sole_squash_target).

cc-context: v0.16.0 (format-core + flip + brew --HEAD restore via rustup + quill notarize resume), v0.17.0 (upstream features), v0.17.1 (CRITICAL: wazero RWX pages need allow-unsigned-executable-memory under the hardened runtime — v0.16.0/v0.17.0 darwin binaries SIGKILL on ccx format; smoke now runs ccx format from the released tarball). AGENTS docs in both repos carry the layering + tag-bump contract.

Follow-ups: f0748e2 (concurrency hardening), 24d181d (pricing blind spots), ad0664f (restart regression), dc50356 (one pending criterion: interactive fast-lane log line).
